# Hyper Apps

> Hyper Apps builds AI-powered Shopify applications for product discovery, customer support, and interactive video commerce.

Hyper Apps helps Shopify merchants improve search and filtering, automate customer support with AI chat and FAQs, and create shoppable video experiences.

## Products

- [Hyper Apps](https://niagarat.com/apps): Overview of the Hyper Apps product suite.
- [Hyper Search & Filter](https://niagarat.com/apps/hyper-search-filter): Semantic product search, smart filters, merchandising controls, and search analytics for Shopify.
- [Hyper AI Chat & FAQs](https://niagarat.com/apps/hyper-ai-chat-faq): AI-powered customer support chat and FAQ automation for Shopify.
- [Hyper Shoppable Videos](https://niagarat.com/apps/hyper-shoppable-videos): Interactive product videos and video commerce tools for Shopify.

## Company

- [About Hyper Apps](https://niagarat.com/about): Company focus and product philosophy.
- [Hyper Apps Team](https://niagarat.com/team): People behind Hyper Apps.
- [Contact Hyper Apps](https://niagarat.com/contact): Contact and product enquiries.

## Content and Research

- [Blog](https://niagarat.com/blog): Articles about Shopify, AI commerce, product discovery, customer experience, and conversion.
- [Resources](https://niagarat.com/resources): Shopify guides, playbooks, checklists, and documentation.
- [Comparisons](https://niagarat.com/comparisons): Shopify application comparisons and evaluation guidance.
- [Case Studies](https://niagarat.com/case-studies): Customer outcomes and implementation examples.
- [Tools](https://niagarat.com/tools): Utilities for evaluating ecommerce and Shopify workflows.
